title: Grammar extraction: PREC_DYNAMIC actions not reaching correct parse states
description: Perl autoquoted_bareword rule has PREC_DYNAMIC(20) on Alt 1 but at parse state 1521 both reductions have dp=0. The dynPrec=20 actions exist at different states (2063/2065) never reached. C parser produces correct output, suggesting grammar data extraction difference. Investigate extract.go and state mapping. Affects Perl/autoquote_edge_cases.
close_reason: Root cause: stale Go grammar files not regenerated after fetch-grammars updated C sources. Fixed in 7111c60.
